bio: Austin Di Nezza is an AI and automation-focused developer based in Montreal, Quebec.
He is currently studying Artificial Intelligence at CDI College and previously studied Computer Sciences at Dawson College.
His work focuses on practical tools, backend logic, dashboards, chatbots, workflow automation, and user-centered technical solutions.
